global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent logo and clear messaging about limited stock and rewards.
global.main_message: Limited stock promotion with a call to action for rewards.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'CrispBox' displayed prominently at the top center, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned near the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An ambiguous element with no clear visual identity, possibly a decorative or placeholder graphic.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: A prominent text block stating 'Limited stock Free shipping over $25' in a bold, easy-to-read font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, positioned at the bottom center.

elements.label: CrispBox headline
elements.description: The headline 'CrispBox' is displayed in large, bold letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC indicator
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, adding credibility to the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold text, CrispBox logo, limited stock message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock, Free shipping over $25, 30%, Claim reward, CrispBox, UGC
